claim: The tested source-only DG control objectives (OACI-control, SRC-control) do NOT transfer to reproducible target worst-domain improvements under strict target isolation.
key_evidence: C8 K1/K2 stop; C14 verdict falsified; C12 SRC anti-transfer

claim: Target-accuracy-good OACI checkpoints EXIST but are invisible to simple source-audit selectors (source-side OBSERVABILITY failure), with a separate calibration barrier.
key_evidence: 6/6 seed-levels reproducible bAcc gain via non-deployable target oracle; source-audit oracle fails

claim: Selected OACI is calibration-improved / accuracy-flat (class-boundary rotation); SRC anti-transfer is source memorization.
key_evidence: mean ΔNLL -0.074, ΔbAcc -0.002; SRC memorization index +1.965 (6/6 flagged)

claim: No strong scalar source signal identifies target-good checkpoints; a WEAK multivariate source-only signal exists; class-boundary rotation is source-mirrored; source signals are calibration-biased.
key_evidence: LOTO probe AUC 0.6023 beats perm p=0.008; best scalar |ρ|<=0.236; boundary corr +0.547

claim: The weak multivariate signal SURVIVES cell-present support stress and collapses only under cell DELETION, and there because the worst-domain accuracy ENDPOINT becomes non-estimable (estimator-level), not because the signal vanished; leakage and class-boundary mirror are support-robust.
key_evidence: S2 0.603 / S3 0.562 beat perm; S4/S6/S7 bAcc->NaN; leakage estimability 1.0

claim: A PRE-REGISTERED low-freedom robust-core probe (deletion-robust source observables) recovers weak IN-REGIME competence information (config hash frozen before the run).
key_evidence: robust-core LOTO 0.561 beats perm p=0.005 margin>=0.03 on S0/S2/S3; per-target 0.57-0.73

claim: Frozen cross-regime external/new-regime validation is NOT established: the C19 signal is largely REGIME-LOCAL. Apparent held-out passes do not survive robust interpretation.
key_evidence: cross-regime pooled AUC 0.50-0.54; Holm 2/4->0/4; Simpson-decoupled; S7 control > S6 treatment

claim: The C19/C20 competence probe is DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY: it emits no selector and makes no deployment claim.
key_evidence: no_selector_artifact gate = True in C19 and C20

claim: Target-oracle labels and source-signal identifiability analyses are diagnostic-only, joined post hoc.
No deployable target-free selector / competence detector is established (diagnostic-only; no-selector gate).
key_evidence: no-selector gate; C20 external validation not established

claim: External / new-regime dataset generalization of the probe is NOT established.
Support mismatch as a NATURAL cause in BNCI2014_001 is NOT demonstrated (masks are controlled).
key_evidence: controlled masks only; BNCI001 not shown naturally support-mismatched

claim: We do NOT make blanket over-claims (all-DG-failure, EEG-transfer-impossibility, or support-aware-invariance worthlessness); the falsification is protocol-scoped (single dataset / single backbone).
Score CALIBRATION / a target-free competence ESTIMAND that transports cross-regime: within-target ranking appears stable (~0.64) and suggests a future score-calibration question.
key_evidence: within-target mean AUC ~0.63-0.65 stable; pooled does not transport

claim: External-dataset validation on a genuinely new cohort, via a pre-registered protocol (C20-B) -> C21+ execution ONLY after approval. BNCI2014_004 remains BARRED.
key_evidence: protocol only; no execution; BNCI2014_004 BARRED_pending_explicit_approval

claim: Real support-mismatched clinical EEG validation (hierarchical D=(cohort,subject)) is future work.
key_evidence: PD/SCZ cohorts not provisioned; clinical loader offline-only
